name: vinelabs-de/xrechnung-kit
description: EN 16931 / XRechnung 3.0 compliant e-invoice generator and validator. Framework-agnostic core.

suggest.psr/log: Wire your application's PSR-3 logger into the validator alert pipeline.
suggest.vineethkrishnan/xrechnung-kit-kosit-bund: Adds KoSIT Schematron validation alongside the bundled UBL XSD validation.
suggest.vineethkrishnan/xrechnung-kit-pdfa: PDF/A-3 hybrid invoice support: embed the XRechnung XML inside a visual PDF, framework-agnostic.
suggest.vineethkrishnan/xrechnung-kit-laravel: Laravel service provider, facade, and queueable job.
suggest.vineethkrishnan/xrechnung-kit-typo3: TYPO3 extension and Symfony DI service.
suggest.vineethkrishnan/xrechnung-kit-shopware: Shopware 6 plugin and order workflow integration.
suggest.vineethkrishnan/xrechnung-kit-wordpress: WordPress plugin with WooCommerce order integration.
suggest.vineethkrishnan/xrechnung-kit-contenido: Contenido CMS plugin and service class.
